title: Thrixspermum psiloglottis
uses: Thrixspermum psiloglottis is a species of orchid that has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Indian subcontinent. The plant is valued for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In Ayurvedic medicine, Thrixspermum psiloglottis is believed to have various health benefits, including aiding in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
